selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 例证, 插图
words.definition: n. artwork that helps make something clear or attractive

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: a. 延续的, 伸出的, 竭尽全力的, 广大的, 扩大范围的
words.definition: a. fully extended or stretched forth

words.translation: adv. 离去
words.definition: s. not present; having left

words.translation: n. 手指, 指状物, (手套的)手指部分, 指针；v. 用手指拨弄, 伸出
words.definition: n. any of the terminal members of the hand (sometimes excepting the thumb)

words.translation: n. 音乐, 乐曲
words.definition: n. an artistic form of auditory communication incorporating instrumental or vocal tones in a structured and continuous manner

words.translation: n. 拇指；vt. 以拇指拨弄, 笨拙地摆弄, 用拇指翻旧, 迅速翻阅, 作搭车手势
words.definition: n. the thick short innermost digit of the forelimb

words.translation: n. 圆, 圆形物, 巡回, 循环, 一轮, 一回合, 一局, 范围, 轮唱；a. 圆的, 球形的, 丰满的, 肥胖的, 完全的, 大概的, 完美的, 圆润的
words.definition: n. a charge of ammunition for a single shot

words.translation: prep. 直到, 在...以前；conj. 直到...时, 在...以前
words.definition: prep. To; unto; towards; -- used of material objects.

words.translation: n. 拳头, 手；vt. 拳打, 握成拳, 紧握
words.definition: n. a hand with the fingers clenched in the palm (as for hitting)

words.translation: n. 水, 雨水, 海水, 水位, 水面, 流水；vt. 给...浇水, 供以水, 注入水, 使湿
words.definition: n. binary compound that occurs at room temperature as a clear colorless odorless tasteless liquid; freezes into ice below 0 degrees centigrade and boils above 1

words.translation: n. 面包, 生计, 食物；vt. 裹以面包屑
words.definition: n. food made from dough of flour or meal and usually raised with yeast or baking powder and then baked

words.translation: n. 婴孩
words.definition: n. a very young child (birth to 1 year) who has not yet begun to walk or talk

words.translation: n. 晚餐, 正餐, 宴会
words.definition: n. the main meal of the day served in the evening or at midday

words.translation: adv. 一起, 共同, 彼此
words.definition: s. mentally and emotionally stable

words.translation: n. 索引, 指针, 指数, 指标；vt. 编入索引中, 指出
words.definition: n. a numerical scale used to compare variables with one another or with some reference number

words.translation: a. 忙碌的, 热闹的, 没空的；vt. 使忙
words.definition: v. keep busy with

words.translation: num. 五, 五个
words.definition: n. the cardinal number that is the sum of four and one

words.translation: n. 树, 木料, 树状物；vt. 把...赶上树
words.definition: n. a tall perennial woody plant having a main trunk and branches forming a distinct elevated crown; includes both gymnosperms and angiosperms

words.translation: n. 土地, 战场, 场地, 地面, 范围；a. 土地的, 地面上的
words.definition: n. a position to be won or defended in battle (or as if in battle)

words.translation: n. 母亲, 修女院长；vt. 产生, 照看, 收养
words.definition: n. a woman who has given birth to a child (also used as a term of address to your mother)

words.translation: n. 玉蜀黍, 谷类, 谷粒, 鸡眼；vt. 使成颗粒, 腌
words.definition: n. tall annual cereal grass bearing kernels on large ears: widely cultivated in America in many varieties; the principal cereal in Mexico and Central and South

words.translation: a. 软的, 温和的, 柔和的, 柔滑的, 温柔的, 软弱的, 坡度小的, 笨的, 纸币的；n. 柔软的东西, 笨人, 纸币

words.translation: n. 门, 牌楼, 大门, 通道, 闸；vt. 装门于

words.translation: 太太

words.translation: n. 农夫, 农场主

words.translation: n. 跑, 赛跑, 奔跑, 奔跑的路程, 趋向, 流出, 运转时间, 连续；vi. 跑, 奔跑, 跑步, 赛跑, 竞赛, 行驶, 运转, 进行, 蔓延

words.translation: a. 左边的, 左倾的, 左侧的, 左派的；adv. 在左面

words.translation: n. 游戏, 游玩, 玩笑, 运动, 比赛, 赌博, 跳动, 表演, 剧本；v. 玩, 游戏, 假装, 开玩笑, 比赛, 扮演, 演奏, 演戏, 传摇曳, (使)跳动

words.translation: n. 压榨机, 磨坊, 制造厂；vt. 碾磨, 磨细, 搅拌, 使乱转

words.translation: n. 亲爱的人；a. 亲爱的, 昂贵的, 严重的, 急迫的

words.translation: adv. 不久, 早, 快, 宁可

words.translation: n. 奶油, 黄油；vt. 涂黄油于

words.translation: n. 家, 避难所, 故乡；a. 家庭的, 国内的, 打中目标的

words.translation: prep. 在...之上, 迫近, 紧接着

words.translation: n. 面粉, 粉沫, 碎粉
